string.text: A black box which has survived a crash. It should contain details of the flight’s last moments, albeit in encrypted format.
Military grade plastic explosives with a 10 second timer.
Green X7 keycard
A green magnetic keycard marked with X7.\nThe card must not fall into anyone else’s hands, as it can be used to access the secret laboratory.
Blind dog figurine
A blind dog figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Pseudodog figurine
A pseudodog figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Boar figurine
A boar figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Flesh figurine
A flesh figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Burer figurine
A burer figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Controller figurine
A controller figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Chimera figurine
A chimera figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Snork figurine
A snork figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Pseudogiant figurine
A pseudodog figurine, made by a craftsman who previously resided at the Outpost. Rather high quality with many small details.
Vaccine
A vaccine contraining a strong substance that filters toxins in an organism. The ampule is designed for one application on a human adult. Can cause addiction.
Note from Obscurant
A stalker note written on a sheet of paper torn out of a notebook. To read, click “Use.”
Note from Knucklehead
A stalker note written on a sheet of paper torn out of a notebook. To read, click “Use.”
My backpack
My personal backpack that was missing.
